title: Aparna Constructions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Aparna Constructions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
